description.japanese: チュートリアルをクリアする

description.brazilian: Complete a missão final de treinamento
description.japanese: 最後のトレーニングミッションをクリアする
description.schinese: 完成最后一关训练任务
description.spanish: Completa la última misión de entrenamiento

description.brazilian: Você está progredindo bem. Agora os desafios ficam mais difíceis
description.dutch: Je boekt goede vooruitgang. Het wordt nu uitdagender
description.english: You’re making good progress. It’s getting more challenging now
description.french: Vous progressez bien. Les défis deviennent plus exigeants
description.german: Du machst gute Fortschritte. Jetzt wird es anspruchsvoller
description.italian: Stai facendo buoni progressi. Ora diventa più impegnativo
description.japanese: 順調に進んでいます。これからより難しくなります
description.russian: Вы успешно продвигаетесь. Теперь задачи становятся сложнее
description.schinese: 你进步很快，挑战变得更加艰难
description.spanish: Estás avanzando bien. Ahora se vuelve más desafiante
description.turkish: İyi ilerliyorsun. Şimdi işler daha da zorlaşıyor

description.brazilian: Você chegou tão longe. Os desafios mais difíceis estão ao seu alcance
description.dutch: Je bent al zo ver gekomen. De zwaarste uitdagingen liggen binnen bereik
description.english: You’ve come this far. The toughest challenges are within reach
description.french: Vous êtes allé loin. Les défis les plus difficiles sont à portée
description.german: Du bist weit gekommen. Die schwierigsten Herausforderungen liegen vor dir
description.italian: Sei arrivato fin qui. Le sfide più difficili sono a portata
description.japanese: ここまで来ました。最も難しい挑戦が目前です
description.russian: Вы продвинулись так далеко. Самые трудные испытания уже близко
description.schinese: 你已经走到这里，最困难的挑战近在眼前
description.spanish: Has llegado tan lejos. Los desafíos más difíciles están a tu alcance
description.turkish: Bu kadar ilerledin. En zorlu görevler artık ulaşılabilir durumda

description.brazilian: O ciclo está completo. Você aprendeu o que é necessário para mantê-lo
description.dutch: De cyclus is voltooid. Je hebt geleerd wat nodig is om deze voort te zetten
description.english: The cycle is complete. You’ve learned what it takes to sustain it
description.french: Le cycle est complet. Vous avez appris ce qu’il faut pour le maintenir
description.german: Der Kreislauf ist vollendet. Du hast gelernt, was nötig ist, um ihn aufrechtzuerhalten
description.italian: Il ciclo è completo. Hai imparato cosa serve per sostenerlo
description.japanese: サイクルが完了しました。維持するために必要なことを学びました
description.russian: Цикл завершён. Вы узнали, что нужно, чтобы его поддерживать
description.schinese: 循环已完成，你已经掌握了维持它所需的一切
description.spanish: El ciclo está completo. Has aprendido lo necesario para mantenerlo
description.turkish: Döngü tamamlandı. Sürdürmek için gerekenleri öğrendin

description.brazilian: Conecte 200 blocos de gelo em 400 movimentos ou menos
description.french: Reliez 200 plaques de glace en 400 coups ou moins
description.italian: Collega 200 banchi di ghiaccio in 400 mosse o meno
description.japanese: 200個の氷の島を400手以内でつなげる
description.russian: Соедините 200 льдин за 400 ходов или меньше
description.schinese: 在 400 步内连接 200 块浮冰
description.spanish: Conecta 200 témpanos de hielo en 400 movimientos o menos

description.brazilian: Infeste 17.000 tiles dentro do limite de tempo
description.french: Infestez 17 000 cases dans le temps imparti
description.italian: Infesta 17.000 celle entro il tempo limite
description.japanese: 制限時間内に17,000タイルを占領する
description.schinese: 在时间限制内占领 17,000 个格子
description.spanish: Infesta 17,000 casillas dentro del límite de tiempo
description.turkish: Zaman sınırlaması içinde 17.000 karoyu istila et

description.brazilian: Mantenha o fogo aceso por 5 minutos
description.dutch: Houd het vuur 5 minuten aan de gang
description.german: Halte das Feuer 5 Minuten lang am Brennen
description.italian: Mantieni il fuoco acceso per 5 minuti
description.japanese: 火を5分間燃やし続ける
description.schinese: 保持火焰燃烧 5 分钟
description.spanish: Mantén el fuego encendido durante 5 minutos

description.brazilian: Complete todos os 3 objetivos extras em um nível
description.dutch: Voltooi alle 3 extra doelen in een level
description.english: Complete all 3 stretch goals in a level
description.french: Complétez les 3 objectifs supplémentaires dans un niveau
description.german: Erreiche alle 3 Zusatzziele in einem Level
description.italian: Completa tutti e 3 gli obiettivi bonus in un livello
description.japanese: レベル内の3つの追加目標すべてを達成する
description.russian: Выполните все 3 дополнительных цели в уровне
description.schinese: 在关卡中完成所有 3 个额外目标
description.spanish: Completa los 3 objetivos adicionales en un nivel
description.turkish: Bir seviyede tüm 3 ek hedefi tamamla

description.brazilian: Alcance 100 de população em qualquer nível
description.dutch: Bereik 100 inwoners in een willekeurig level
description.french: Atteignez une population de 100 dans n’importe quel niveau
description.german: Erreiche eine Bevölkerung von 100 in einem beliebigen Level
description.italian: Raggiungi una popolazione di 100 in un livello qualsiasi
description.japanese: 任意のレベルで人口100に到達する
description.schinese: 在任意关卡中达到 100 人口
description.spanish: Alcanza 100 de población en cualquier nivel

description.french: Atteignez 100 % de progression dans le jeu
description.italian: Raggiungi il 100% di completamento del gioco
description.schinese: 在游戏中达到 100% 完成度
description.spanish: Alcanza el 100% de completitud del juego
